race.description: Become A Brc Member C,G&E Mdn Plate
race.comment: COMIN'HOMETOYOU (4) returned in good order with a close-up second at Ipswich and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and maps nicely for this from gate five. Can go one better against this line-up. LOTTERY LINK (6) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the runner-up finish when resuming at the Sunny Coast was full of merit. Can bounce back without surprising. MOSCOW MULE (7) was well in the betting at Eagle Farm on debut but just ran into a couple better on that occasion. Where there's smoke there's fire and can play a major role in the outcome. ST ANDREWS (10) has been right there in all three outings this preparation and is another to get some weight relief. In the mix. CAUTIONARY TAIL (2) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
